evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Identify and troubleshoot data quality issues and discrepancies, ensuring accurate, timely, and reliable data availability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (data quality troubleshooting, accuracy, reliability, change control) dominate with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Design and implement data models and schemas tailored for financial reporting, analysis, and decision‑making
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role's core purpose is supporting Finance team financial reporting and decision-making from ERP/GL source systems, explicit financial reporting language placing it at the highest risk tier.
evidence.data_team_maturity: supporting Lenovo's Finance team in digital transformation and analytics initiatives
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established, large global company with a named digital transformation initiative and defined ETL/BI processes indicates a mature, existing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop, maintain, and optimize ETL pipelines to integrate data from source systems (e.g. ERP, GL, CRM)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific source systems and tools (ERP, GL, CRM, Power BI end-to-end, Azure Databricks/SQL Server, Talend/Informatica/SSIS) give a concrete picture of daily work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: supporting Lenovo's Finance team in digital transformation and analytics initiatives
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The Finance team and financial reporting are the explicit primary audience and purpose of the role throughout.
evidence.autonomy_level: Act as a BI Developer / Consultant, supporting Lenovo's Finance team in digital transformation and analytics initiatives
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role is explicitly framed as support/consulting to the Finance team, with UAT support and change-control management rather than direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing: Identify and troubleshoot data quality issues and discrepancies, ensuring accurate, timely, and reliable data availability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality issue identification and troubleshooting are named as an owned responsibility with explicit ownership language.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Identify and troubleshoot data quality issues and discrepancies, ensuring accurate, timely, and reliable data availability
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data accuracy and reliability for financial reporting and decision-making dominate the responsibilities, reflecting fear of bad financial data reaching decision-makers.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop, maintain, and optimize ETL pipelines to integrate data from source systems (e.g. ERP, GL, CRM)
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verbs (maintain, optimize, troubleshoot) indicate scaling and fixing existing financial reporting infrastructure rather than greenfield building.
evidence.loss_aversion: Identify and troubleshoot data quality issues and discrepancies, ensuring accurate, timely, and reliable data availability — reflects fear of inaccurate financial data reaching Finance decision-makers.
